behavior_in_task_description.reason: Instruction names all affected files, the helper function name 'deser_annotated_value', the BoundedVisitor path 'sui_types::object::bounded_visitor', and the methods to remove.

no_solution_leakage.reason: Instruction describes what to remove/update but not exact line-level replacements.

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: test_value_test_has_helper_function requires the specific function name 'deser_annotated_value', and test_annotated_value_anyhow_import_removed asserts the exact string 'use anyhow::Result as AResult;' is absent — though the helper name is documented in instruction, the anyhow import form is gold-specific (alternative valid removals could leave e.g. 'use anyhow::Result;' which the test would pass, but the test still enforces a specific implementation detail).

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: Tests include cargo check, cargo test, cargo fmt, and cargo clippy subprocess invocations in addition to text inspection.

test_not_tautological.reason: Tests require compilation and real test pass of move-core-types, so stubs wouldn't suffice.

behavior_in_tests.reason: All required behaviors (removal of methods, updated event.rs, helper function, compile/test/clippy/fmt) are covered by tests.

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests have descriptive names and docstrings grouped by file/behavior.

instruction_no_hint_leakage.reason: Instruction names files but not specific line numbers; localization is part of the task scope.
